summary: The video shows a snowy road with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. A large truck dominates the right side of the frame, while smaller cars move alongside it. Snow accumulates along the roadside, and the road appears wet due to melting snow.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles travel on a snowy road, including a large truck and several smaller cars.

uncertainties: Exact positions of all vehicles are unclear due to snowfall.
Visibility of distant objects may be impaired.

risk_assessment.why: Minimal risk of collision due to clear visibility and controlled vehicle speeds.
